title: P0: Fix PlaceBlock systematic failure — "goal was changed before it could be completed"
description:
Every place-block action fails with "The goal was changed before it could be completed!" in the adapter. Root cause: handleStop() in the adapter calls bot.pathfinder.setGoal(null) which interrupts in-progress goto() navigation during place/move actions. The stop is triggered from C# error recovery path (or CancelGoal) and arrives as an interleaved WebSocket message while the adapter is mid-navigation.

Fix implemented in Sprint 57: handleStop() now suppresses pathfinder.setGoal(null) when _dispatchingAction is 'place' or 'move'. _dispatchingAction is tracked in drainQueue. This allows the current navigation to complete while still clearing the queue and setting _stopRequested for subsequent actions.
